name: Sweet-And-Sour Duck Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Firm, ripe red plums - pitted, in 1/2 inch chunks
1 cup Rice wine or cider vinegar
recipeInstructions:
Should yield about 2 quarts. Should yield about 1 cup.
Place all ingredients except the sugar in a wide, 4-quart saucepan and bring to boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally. Boil steadily for about 30 minutes.
Remove from heat, strain through a food mill, and return pureed fruit to pan. Add sugar, place over medium heat, and stir constantly until mixture boils again. Boil steadily about 30 minutes, stirring often to prevent sticking; continue boiling about 15 more minutes, stirring constantly. Sauce is done when about 1/2 teaspoon sets on a chilled saucer.
Spoon immediately into hot, sterilized half-pint jars and seal. Store at least a week to mellow.
Yield: About 5 1/2 cups.
